name: Tabitha Isner
subject: Pardon me while I get a little theological...
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Logos/Logo3.PNG]

Dear Friend,

It's Sunday morning, so I hope you'll forgive me for preaching a little.

I've been thinking a lot lately about what it means to be present. Perhaps its because yesterday we laid to rest Paddy Quinn, a man who was so good at it. Paddy was a man who always showed up. Most obviously, I mean that he came to things. If you asked him to be there, he'd be there. Heck, even if you didn't explicitly ask him, he would come. He knew a powerful truism - it means a lot to someone that you show up .
But it's also that when he was there, he was fully present, with his whole being. As much as he loved social media, he didn't multi-task during meetings or rallies. He gave you his full attention. The kind of attention that silently communicates, "You're important to me" or "There's nowhere else I'd rather be."

Photo of Paddy Quinn: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Phone%20collection%20email%20-%20smaller.PNG]

Showing up speaks volumes. It's simply what you do for the people and the things that are most important to you. You go even when you don't know what you'll do when you get there. You show up because nothing communicates your priority and your caring more clearly than your presence.

We are less than 60 days from the election now. And it's a big one. The outcome of this election determines whether our country tailspins into further division & chaos. I am doing everything in my power to prevent that from happening, but I can't win without a major field effort, so I need you to be present.

I need you to be here for phone banks and for door knocking. I need you to fill out the crowd at my events. I need you to be fully present in the days leading up to November 6th . Your presence speaks volumes.

Commit to being present.

Give it your full attention.

Sign Up Now: [http://secure.ngpvan.com/3xytiL_vkkSCrEYpXLx4fA2?emci=7bf89bee-24b3-e811-bce7-000d3a12b7e6&emdi=2b007711-33b4-e811-bce7-000d3a12b7e6&ceid=6898985&smartlinkdata=JmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20%3D]

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Read between the (ballot) lines
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Make no mistake about it -- this Election Day is about much more than the names that appear on your ballot. **Vice President Mike Pence said publicly that the GOP will try to repeal the Affordable Care Act _again_ if the midterm elections go well for Republicans.** | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5f/622b7b5b/1ca3b097/307b6fea/1101466314/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180908?refcode=dwse180908_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
When you go to the polls in November, you're not just voting for a Democrat or a Republican -- you're voting to protect Americans with pre-existing conditions, or not. You're voting to keep access to affordable health insurance open to millions of Americans, or not.
When you read between the lines, health care is on the ballot this year -- and it's up to us to protect it.
[**This month is the final FEC fundraising quarter of the election. We've set an aggressive goal -- $28,000 -- because this is an exceptionally important year. Will you help us reach it?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5f/622b7b5b/1ca3b097/307b6fea/1101466314/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180908?refcode=dwse180908_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
I am a breast cancer survivor. I know what it's like to be sitting in a doctor's office, get that diagnosis, and wonder what comes next. How will I tell my family? What course of treatment gives me the best chance?
The last question someone should have to ask at that moment is _"how am I going to pay for this?"_ or _"are my premiums about to skyrocket?"_
**I refuse to go back to those days.** I don't know why the Republicans feel the need to put their friends in the insurance industry over the people who elected them, but I won't let them get away with it.
**Help us fight back right now to make sure these midterms go well for Democrats.[Rush in a contribution of $5 or more toward our $28,000 FEC goal.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5f/622b7b5b/1ca3b097/307b6fea/1101466314/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180908?refcode=dwse180908_m&recurring=true&amount=5")**
And when you cast your ballot this November, remember everything that's at stake.
Thank you.
Debbie

name: Terese Casey
subject: my husband, Bob
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6288/51dbcc2a/1d436b2b/3a8b5ba/3096087590/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Hi there,

I took a Labor Day weekend road trip with Bob last weekend. We loaded up the car and drove to Pittsburgh, where we met with working families and talked about the importance of the holiday, what keeps them up at night and what they're hoping for in November.

The stories I heard out in Western Pennsylvania were the same stories people tell me at the grocery store in Scranton -- people just want good jobs with fair wages, health care they can count on and a bright future for their kids. But the Trump administration is threatening the very foundation of the middle class, and they're worried.

I'm right there with them. As a mom and as a citizen, I want better than what's happening in Washington. That's why I'm voting for Bob in November. Not because he's my husband, but because he fights every day for middle-class families. When parents talk about not being able to afford health care for their kids or when seniors worry about the future of Medicare, Bob gets mad. And then he gets to work.

I want you to know that Bob is fighting for you. He hears your concerns and he's doing everything he can to protect working families across Pennsylvania from this administration's dangerous agenda.

**There are less than two months left in this campaign, and so much more work to be done to send Bob back to the Senate so he can keep fighting for us. So, if you can, please consider making a donation to his campaign today:**

[**_secure.bobcasey.com/donate_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180909_fr1_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Your support is so appreciated, I hope you know that.

Thanks,

Terese

subject: Making a difference
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | This email has a lot of information about what I've been working on, and I hope you will take a moment to read it.

**_[I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want to make sure you understand why and how I'm working to earn it.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+I+need+your+support+for+my+reelection+ca&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**I have been leading the conversation on cybersecurity and the threats we face from foreign hackers.** Beyond our election infrastructure, our energy grids and transportation systems are also susceptible to hacking attacks, with potentially disastrous consequences. We secured $380 million for election security earlier this year, and my amendment to establish a national cyber warfare doctrine passed the Senate earlier this month.

**I 've also been fighting to protect investments in our rural transportation infrastructure in New Mexico.** The Senate recently passed my bipartisan amendment for an additional $50 million to help maintain the Southwest Chief Amtrak route. Trains help connect New Mexico to the rest of the country, and keeping this route is critical to the local economy and the rural communities that rely on this line.

**And I 'm standing up to President Trump's cynical attempt to force consumers to bailout uncompetitive coal and nuclear power plants. **In a blatant effort to keep his campaign promises, the president is claiming a national security emergency to keep coal-fired plants open. But the truth is there is no national security emergency, and this artificial bailout will increase energy costs and leave businesses and households paying higher electric bills. I am going to keep fighting against this bailout and any attempt to drag us back on energy, and I will continue to push for modernizing and diversifying our energy grid.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. I am in my first Senate re-election race, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. To make sure that doesn't happen, we need to reach our weekend fundraising goal by bringing in $5,000 in grassroots donations. Will you pitch in and help me reach this goal before the midnight deadline?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1")_**
_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1")** Thanks for all you do,
Martin

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b713/43d8135f/670316df/51001fcc/121644315/VEsHBQ/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b713/43d8135f/670316df/51001fcf/121644315/VEsHBA/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180909_1_1").

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: FWD: make it a success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hi friend,
Yesterday was the first day of our _Get Out The Vote_ campaign! **We knocked on thousands of doors and made thousands of phone calls, but we are nowhere near done! We still need to reach many more people, and need your help to get there.**
It's an intense race, and every single voter we contact could be the difference between keeping Rhode Island's progress going or turning back the clock _years_ on our progress.
**[Click here now to register for a Get Out The Vote volunteer shift!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a01c/5e076a9e/54e6c34c/14425b89/747971531/VEsH/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/mEcDw6aHXUmfoljzf16Hbg2")**
Many thanks,
Gina
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: David Ortiz (info@ginaraimondo.com)
Date: 9/7/18, 9:32AM
Subject: make it a success
Hello friend,
**This weekend, we are kicking off our statewide "Get Out The Vote" campaign** for the Rhode Island Democratic Primary! We are going to be knocking doors and making phone calls all across Rhode Island, **and we need your help to make it a success!**
**[Click here to register for a canvass near you, or a phone bank!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a01c/5e076a9e/54e6c34c/14425b89/747971531/VEsE/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/mEcDw6aHXUmfoljzf16Hbg2")**
**Everyone who comes out to vote on Wednesday, September 12 has a real chance to make a difference** , to be the deciding vote. That's why it is absolutely critical to contact as many voters across the state as we can. **[Will you register for a"Get Out The Vote" event now?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a01c/5e076a9e/54e6c34c/14425b89/747971531/VEsF/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/mEcDw6aHXUmfoljzf16Hbg2")**
Thank you,
David

Deputy Campaign Manager

It's time to let you in on a little secret: I love to draw. I'm no Van Gogh, but I've been sketching my whole life. If you sign up today to be a Blue Wave Donor, I will send you a personal sketch to show my gratitude.

Folks, Now that school is back in session and Labor Day has passed, [we are kicking our campaign for reelection into high gear.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93bf/5486deaa/2af0eaec/dcf823d/33725044/VEsH/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/sign-up-to-help-reelect-rep-tim-ryan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+we+are+kicking+our+campaign+for+reelecti&utm_campaign=em20180907_volask_oh13&source=em20180907_volask_oh13") There is a lot at stake in our community and I'm proud of the hard work and accomplishments over the past years. Through my seat on the powerful Appropriations Committee, I have been able to bring over $200 million back to our community. That includes everything from research and development at our universities to help us transform our economy, to millions for our military installations and police and fire departments that desperately need funds. I've supported higher wages and affordable healthcare for workers, helped our active duty military get their largest pay raise in years, and brought significant money to our downtowns for quality-of-life projects that will help keep our young people here. **Over the next two months, I would be honored to have your help and support as we continue to get this message out. I 'd love to have your assistance as a volunteer to help me campaign throughout the district or even make a few calls or put up a yard sign.** [Please sign up and lend a hand, so I can continue to fight for you in Congress >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93bf/5486deaa/2af0eaec/dcf823c/33725044/VEsE/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/sign-up-to-help-reelect-rep-tim-ryan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Please+sign+up+and+lend+a+hand+so+I+can+&utm_campaign=em20180907_volask_oh13&source=em20180907_volask_oh13") [SIGN UP](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a93bf/5486deaa/2af0eaec/dcf823f/33725044/VEsF/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/sign-up-to-help-reelect-rep-tim-ryan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+UP&utm_campaign=em20180907_volask_oh13&source=em20180907_volask_oh13") Let us know what you're willing to do. subject: Your neighbor? Your mom? Your mailman?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Today marks ONE MONTH until the voter registration deadline in Georgia. Our team is on a mission to make sure every eligible Georgian is not only registered to vote, but knows how important it is to c |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9cf/34a064cc/c4e5c36/70e0b3c/2122409803/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Hi Friends, Are you registered to vote? How about your friends? Your neighbor? Your mom? Your mailman? **Today marks ONE MONTH until the voter registration deadline in Georgia, and our team is on a mission to make sure every eligible Georgian is not only registered to vote, but knows how important it is to cast a ballot.** Registering to vote is simple. You can even register online from the comfort of your home! **Just visit this[website](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9cf/34a064cc/c4e5c36/70e0b3d/2122409803/VEsE/ "https://registertovote.sos.ga.gov/GAOLVR/welcometoga.do#no-back-button") and click the button on the left to register online, or the button on the right to print the form and register by mail.** **[REGISTER TO VOTE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9cf/34a064cc/c4e5c36/70e0b3d/2122409803/VEsF/ "https://registertovote.sos.ga.gov/GAOLVR/welcometoga.do#no-back-button")** We can't overstate how important it is to register to vote. If we're going to win in November and build a Georgia where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to thrive, ALL OF US will need to make our voices heard at the ballot box. The right to vote is precious, and we can never stop fighting to protect it. So if you haven't had a chance to register yet, do it! **_Right now!_** And if you are registered, check your registration to make sure, and then forward this email to three friends who might need an extra push. Thanks for helping us get the word out before the deadline! Let's do this! \- Team Abrams
---
**[REGISTER TO VOTE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa9cf/34a064cc/c4e5c36/70e0b3d/2122409803/VEsC/ "https://registertovote.sos.ga.gov/GAOLVR/welcometoga.do#no-back-button")**
